languages.text: "Вы принадлежите к какому угодно роду, только не к семейству Гапрак". {n}Изимонд нацеливает на вас плазменный пистолет.{/n} "Тема веры чрезвычайно болезненна для них из-за слухов о пренебрежении Имперским Кредо в пользу {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Культа Механикус{/g}, и абсолютно любой представитель рода будет всячески подчеркивать свою набожность. Ваши речи далеки от богобоязненных".

traits.locale_text: "Вы принадлежите к какому угодно роду, только не к семейству Гапрак". {n}Изимонд нацеливает на вас плазменный пистолет.{/n} "Тема веры чрезвычайно болезненна для них из-за слухов о пренебрежении Имперским Кредо в пользу {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Культа Механикус{/g}, и абсолютно любой представитель рода будет всячески подчеркивать свою набожность. Ваши речи далеки от богобоязненных".

languages.text: "Whatever you are, you are no Gaprak." {n}Sauerback aims his plasma pistol at you.{/n} "Faith is a highly fraught subject for House Gaprak because of all the rumours about their spurning the Imperial Creed in favour of the {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Cult Mechanicus{/g}. Any member of House Gaprak would be at pains to emphasise their piety however they could. You don't sound very pious."
languages.original_text: "Вы принадлежите к какому угодно роду, только не к семейству Гапрак". {n}Изимонд нацеливает на вас плазменный пистолет.{/n} "Тема веры чрезвычайно болезненна для них из-за слухов о пренебрежении Имперским Кредо в пользу {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Культа Механикус{/g}, и абсолютно любой представитель рода будет всячески подчеркивать свою набожность. Ваши речи далеки от богобоязненных".

traits.locale_text: "Whatever you are, you are no Gaprak." {n}Sauerback aims his plasma pistol at you.{/n} "Faith is a highly fraught subject for House Gaprak because of all the rumours about their spurning the Imperial Creed in favour of the {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Cult Mechanicus{/g}. Any member of House Gaprak would be at pains to emphasise their piety however they could. You don't sound very God-fearing."

"Whatever you are, you are no Gaprak." {n}Sauerback aims his plasma pistol at you.{/n} "Faith is a highly fraught subject for House Gaprak because of all the rumours about their spurning the Imperial Creed in favour of the Cult Mechanicus. Any member of House Gaprak would be at pains to emphasise their piety however they could. You don't sound very God-fearing."

"Whatever you are, you are no Gaprak." {n}Sauerback aims his plasma pistol at you.{/n} "Faith is a highly fraught subject for House Gaprak because of all the rumours about their spurning the Imperial Creed in favour of the Cult Mechanicus. Any member of House Gaprak would be at pains to emphasise their piety however they could. You don't sound very God-fearing."

languages.text: «Seas lo que seas, no eres ningún Gaprak». {n}Sauerback te apunta con la pistola de plasma.{/n} «La fe es un asunto crucial para la casa Gaprak por todos los rumores sobre su abandono del Credo imperial en favor del {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Culto Mechanicus{/g}. Todo miembro de la casa aprovecharía cualquier oportunidad para enfatizar su fe en la medida de lo posible. Tú no pareces muy piados{mf|o|a}».
languages.original_text: "Whatever you are, you are no Gaprak." {n}Sauerback aims his plasma pistol at you.{/n} "Faith is a highly fraught subject for House Gaprak because of all the rumours about their spurning the Imperial Creed in favour of the {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Cult Mechanicus{/g}. Any member of House Gaprak would be at pains to emphasise their piety however they could. You don't sound very pious."

traits.locale_text: «Seas lo que seas, no eres ningún Gaprak». {n}Sauerback te apunta con la pistola de plasma.{/n} «La fe es un asunto crucial para la casa Gaprak por todos los rumores sobre su abandono del Credo imperial en favor del {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Culto Mechanicus{/g}. Todo miembro de la casa aprovecharía cualquier oportunidad para enfatizar su fe en la medida de lo posible. Tú no pareces muy piados{mf|o|a}».

languages.text: “不管你是谁，你都不是贾帕克家族的人。”{n}伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克用他的等离子手枪指着你。{/n}“对贾帕克家族来说，信仰是个很有争议的话题。一直有传言说他们背弃了帝国信仰，转投了{g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}机械修会{/g}。所以，任何贾帕克家族的成员都会极力展现他们的虔诚。而你的语气，听起来可没那么虔诚。”
languages.original_text: "Whatever you are, you are no Gaprak." {n}Sauerback aims his plasma pistol at you.{/n} "Faith is a highly fraught subject for House Gaprak because of all the rumours about their spurning the Imperial Creed in favour of the {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Cult Mechanicus{/g}. Any member of House Gaprak would be at pains to emphasise their piety however they could. You don't sound very pious."

traits.locale_text: “不管你是谁，你都不是贾帕克家族的人。”{n}伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克用他的等离子手枪指着你。{/n}“对贾帕克家族来说，信仰是个很有争议的话题。一直有传言说他们背弃了帝国信仰，转投了{g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}机械修会{/g}。所以，任何贾帕克家族的成员都会极力展现他们的虔诚。而你的语气，听起来可没那么虔诚。”

languages.text: « Qui que vous soyez, vous n'êtes pas {mf|un|une} Gaprak, {n}crache Sauerback en braquant son pistolet à plasma dans votre direction.{/n} Au sein de cette maison, la religion est un sujet extrêmement délicat en raison des nombreuses rumeurs l'accusant d'avoir renié le Credo Impérial au profit du {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Culte Mechanicus{/g}. N'importe quel membre de la famille ferait des pieds et des mains pour afficher ostensiblement sa bonne foi. Vous, par contre, ce n'est manifestement pas la piété qui vous étouffe. »
languages.original_text: "Whatever you are, you are no Gaprak." {n}Sauerback aims his plasma pistol at you.{/n} "Faith is a highly fraught subject for House Gaprak because of all the rumours about their spurning the Imperial Creed in favour of the {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Cult Mechanicus{/g}. Any member of House Gaprak would be at pains to emphasise their piety however they could. You don't sound very pious."

traits.locale_text: « Qui que vous soyez, vous n'êtes pas {mf|un|une} Gaprak, {n}crache Sauerback en braquant son pistolet à plasma dans votre direction.{/n} Au sein de cette maison, la religion est un sujet extrêmement délicat en raison des nombreuses rumeurs l'accusant d'avoir renié le Credo Impérial au profit du {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Culte Mechanicus{/g}. N'importe quel membre de la famille ferait des pieds et des mains pour afficher ostensiblement sa bonne foi. Vous, par contre, ce n'est manifestement pas la piété qui vous étouffe. »

languages.text: "Her kimsen Gaprak değilsin." {n}Sauerback, plazma tabancasını sana doğrultuyor.{/n} "İnanç, İmparatorluk İtikadı'nı {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Cult Mechanicus{/g} lehine reddettiklerine dair söylentiler yüzünden Gaprak Hanesi için oldukça çetrefilli bir konu. Gapraklar olsan, ne pahasına olursa olsun dindarlığını vurgulamak için çabalardın. Pek dindar durmuyorsun."
languages.original_text: "Whatever you are, you are no Gaprak." {n}Sauerback aims his plasma pistol at you.{/n} "Faith is a highly fraught subject for House Gaprak because of all the rumours about their spurning the Imperial Creed in favour of the {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Cult Mechanicus{/g}. Any member of House Gaprak would be at pains to emphasise their piety however they could. You don't sound very pious."

traits.locale_text: "Her kimsen Gaprak değilsin." {n}Sauerback, plazma tabancasını sana doğrultuyor.{/n} "İnanç, İmparatorluk İtikadı'nı {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Cult Mechanicus{/g} lehine reddettiklerine dair söylentiler yüzünden Gaprak Hanesi için oldukça çetrefilli bir konu. Gapraklar olsan, ne pahasına olursa olsun dindarlığını vurgulamak için çabalardın. Pek dindar durmuyorsun."

languages.text: "Was auch immer Ihr seid, Ihr seid kein Gaprak." {n}Sauerback zielt mit seiner Plasmapistole auf dich.{/n} "Vertrauen ist für Haus Gaprak angesichts der Gerüchte, dass es den Imperialen Glauben zugunsten des {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Kult Mechanicus{/g} abgelegt hat, ein heikles Thema. Jedes Mitglied von Haus Gaprak würde sich bemühen, seine Frömmigkeit zu betonen. Ihr klingt nicht sonderlich fromm."
languages.original_text: "Whatever you are, you are no Gaprak." {n}Sauerback aims his plasma pistol at you.{/n} "Faith is a highly fraught subject for House Gaprak because of all the rumours about their spurning the Imperial Creed in favour of the {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Cult Mechanicus{/g}. Any member of House Gaprak would be at pains to emphasise their piety however they could. You don't sound very pious."

traits.locale_text: "Was auch immer Ihr seid, Ihr seid kein Gaprak." {n}Sauerback zielt mit seiner Plasmapistole auf dich.{/n} "Vertrauen ist für Haus Gaprak angesichts der Gerüchte, dass es den Imperialen Glauben zugunsten des {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Kult Mechanicus{/g} abgelegt hat, ein heikles Thema. Jedes Mitglied von Haus Gaprak würde sich bemühen, seine Frömmigkeit zu betonen. Ihr klingt nicht sonderlich fromm."

languages.text: 「何であろうと、あなたはギャプラクではない。 」{n}サウアーバックはプラズマピストルをあなたに向ける。{/n}「ギャプラク家は、帝国の教義を捨てて{g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}機械神教{/g}を信仰していると噂されているため、信仰は非常にデリケートな問題である。ギャプラク家の者は、信仰を強調しようと必死になるだろう。あなたは信仰に欠けているようだ。」
languages.original_text: "Whatever you are, you are no Gaprak." {n}Sauerback aims his plasma pistol at you.{/n} "Faith is a highly fraught subject for House Gaprak because of all the rumours about their spurning the Imperial Creed in favour of the {g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}Cult Mechanicus{/g}. Any member of House Gaprak would be at pains to emphasise their piety however they could. You don't sound very pious."

traits.locale_text: 「何であろうと、あなたはギャプラクではない。 」{n}サウアーバックはプラズマピストルをあなたに向ける。{/n}「ギャプラク家は、帝国の教義を捨てて{g|Encyclopedia:CultMechanicus}機械神教{/g}を信仰していると噂されているため、信仰は非常にデリケートな問題である。ギャプラク家の者は、信仰を強調しようと必死になるだろう。あなたは信仰に欠けているようだ。」
